caribbean.headline: Grand Cayman braces for heavy rain, moderate seas
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is facing 100% rain probability today with sustained winds reaching 16 kt and significant wave heights of 6.4 ft driven by southeast swell with an 8-second period. Cozumel to the north will see lighter conditions with 13 kt winds, but both ports remain in the wetter system's influence through the forecast period.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Remains Settled; Venice Sees Light Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing benign conditions with maximum sustained winds of 15 kt, significant wave heights of 2.0 ft, and 38% rain probability today. Light southeasterly swell with a 4-second period dominates the central Mediterranean, with Lisbon to the west seeing similarly calm 14 kt winds.
